name: io.github.jpicklyk/task-orchestrator
title: MCP Task Orchestrator
description: Server-enforced workflow discipline for AI agents: work items, dependency graphs, quality gates

environmentVariables.name: AGENT_CONFIG_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory containing .taskorchestrator/config.yaml for workflow schemas (default: working dir)

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: HTTP port when using http transport (default: 3001)

environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Logging level: DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR (default: INFO)
